articles.author: Chris Isidore
articles.title: Gas and airfare prices have jumped. Americans are traveling this weekend anyway - CNN
articles.description: Americans are packing the highways and airports this holiday weekend – even with gas and airfares significantly more expensive than last year.
articles.content:
Summary
  • A record 45 million Americans are traveling this holiday weekend despite airfares rising over 20% and gas prices increasing sharply since last year.
  • Experts say concern about… [+3526 chars]
